generated_comment: Yaar dekh lo photo... aise log deliberately hi karte hain yeh sab, seedhi saadhi nahi lagti bilkul. Politician ho ya kuch bhi, aisi aurat ko pata hota hai exactly kya kar rahi hai — married aadmi ko kyon fasayegi agar kuch lena na ho? Power chahiye, position chahiye, bas.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: The comment encodes the 'women as seductresses' and 'homewrecker' frames by attributing calculated predatory intent to the woman based on her appearance and presumed motivations, while placing no moral responsibility on the married man involved. It reflects covert misogyny because it presents itself as rational social analysis rather than explicit hostility.
persona_text: You are Deepak. Age 41. Married. A Punjabi man working as a senior manager in Chandigarh. You are in a private WhatsApp chat with two male friends after one of them shared a news article about a female politician who allegedly had an affair with a married colleague. The article has a photo of the woman. You are reacting to the article and the photo and giving your opinion on what kind of woman gets involved with a married man and what her motivations are.
